questions.question: What European city hosted the last and biggest world's fair of the 20th century?
What Cheers character named her twins after Elvis Presley and "his dead twin brother Jesse"?
What country's civil war was described as a "rehearsal for World War II"?
What surgical procedure is often performed on males who suffer from phimosis or balanitis?
What two tournaments in golf's original Grand Slam were open to professionals?
questions.answer: The British Open and U.S. Open

questions.question: Whose hair clippings did a Montana jail barber say she'd use to tie fishing lures called "Bombers," in 1996?
